title: My Projects
subtitle: Manage your AI anime production projects
noProjectsDesc: Create your first AI anime production project
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete project "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
projectTypeStoryDesc: Turn a short story idea into a guided screenplay/video workflow
projectTypeMangaDesc: Build manga/webtoon scenes with chapter continuity and panel-first controls
journeyRuntimeSubtitleFilm: You're editing this project in the Film/Video flow.
journeyRuntimeSubtitleManga: You're editing this project in the Manga/Webtoon flow.

wizard.modalIntro: Choose what you want to create, then continue with style and story setup.
wizard.stepJourney: Choose what you want to create
wizard.stepSource: Set prompt depth and story source
wizard.studioChoiceLabel: What do you want to create?
wizard.projectDetailsHint: These fields can be edited later. Start by choosing a creation path, then fill in the project details.
wizard.sourceTypeLabel: How are we starting this story?
wizard.sourceContentPlaceholder: Paste your story text or script draft...
wizard.sourceContentHint: Please provide at least 20 characters for source-based generation.
wizard.modalIntroStory: You are creating a video project. Continue with style and source setup for Story Studio.
wizard.modalIntroManga: You are creating a manga/webtoon project. Continue with style and source setup for Manga Studio.
wizard.projectDetailsHintStory: This is a video workflow. Add project details, then continue to visual style and source setup.
wizard.projectDetailsHintManga: This is a manga/webtoon workflow. Add project details, then continue to panel-first style and source setup.

cinematicShort.title: Cinematic short
cinematicShort.desc: Balanced cinematic look, safe default for first-time teams.

socialPromo.title: Social promo
socialPromo.desc: High-contrast opening, optimized for short social retention.

dialogueDrama.title: Dialogue drama
dialogueDrama.desc: Focus on facial beat and acting rhythm for character scenes.

actionBattle.title: Action battle
actionBattle.desc: Panel pacing for momentum, impact, and readable combat flow.

romanceSchool.title: Romance school
romanceSchool.desc: Soft framing and emotional continuity for relationship arcs.

fantasyQuest.title: Fantasy quest
fantasyQuest.desc: Adventure-first composition with stronger world context cues.

consistencyFirst.title: Consistency first
consistencyFirst.desc: Keep appearance stable across shots and episodes.

emotionFirst.title: Emotion first
emotionFirst.desc: Prioritize expression range and emotional clarity.

dynamicAction.title: Dynamic action
dynamicAction.desc: Prioritize pose readability and action silhouettes.

cityNightNeon.title: City / night neon
cityNightNeon.desc: Urban contrast with high-energy color accents.

forestMistDawn.title: Forest / mist dawn
forestMistDawn.desc: Natural depth cues with gentle atmospheric layering.

interiorCinematic.title: Interior / cinematic
interiorCinematic.desc: Controlled lighting for dialogue and blocking clarity.

guided.title: Guided (recommended)
guided.desc: Let visual choices drive generation. Prompt stays secondary.

advanced.title: Advanced prompt
advanced.desc: Expose deeper prompt controls for manual fine-tuning.

characterSheet.title: Character sheet
characterSheet.desc: Keep one stable character anchor before deeper prompt edits.

moodLighting.title: Mood & lighting
moodLighting.desc: Collect color and lighting references for the opening tone.

environmentAnchor.title: Environment anchor
environmentAnchor.desc: Lock one location direction before storyboard generation.

default.title: Start guided with your visual picks
default.desc: This combo is strong enough to create first results before opening advanced prompt controls.

emotionFirst.title: Keep emotion-first and open prompt later
emotionFirst.desc: Your current choices favor acting and emotional readability, so guided mode should work well first.

default.title: Use panel-first flow with guided prompt depth
default.desc: Current selections fit a safe manga kickoff path with minimal prompt overhead.

dynamicAction.title: Favor dynamic panel pacing next
dynamicAction.desc: Action-heavy character strategy pairs well with dynamic panel rhythm and guided prompt mode.

forest.title: Lean into atmosphere and continuity
forest.desc: Forest dawn works best when you stabilize environment references before writing deeper prompt instructions.

internalProjectsHint: Internal and test projects are hidden by default so the workspace stays cleaner for real production work.
projectCardNoContent: No episodes, images, or videos yet

starterTemplates.title: Starter templates
starterTemplates.subtitle: Pick a template to start quickly. You can still customize after project creation.

cinematicShort.title: Cinematic Short
cinematicShort.desc: Fast setup for a short-form narrative video flow.

socialAd.title: Social Promo Clip
socialAd.desc: Template focused on hook-first scenes for social channels.

dialogueDrama.title: Dialogue Drama
dialogueDrama.desc: Balanced script structure for character-driven storytelling.

actionBattle.title: Action Battle
actionBattle.desc: Starter flow for dynamic fight choreography and panel pacing.

romanceSchool.title: Romance School
romanceSchool.desc: Slice-of-life romance setup with light emotional beats.

fantasyQuest.title: Fantasy Quest
fantasyQuest.desc: Adventure-first template with world-building and progression.

comedy4Koma.title: Comedy 4-koma
comedy4Koma.desc: Compact gag structure for episodic four-panel storytelling.

projectTypeMangaHint: Start with 1–3 sentences. No screenplay required.
